name: dev-trio
description: Autonomous AI coding agent orchestration for GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, and OpenAI Codex — with session logging and credit tracking built in.

dev-trio.notifications.telegram.enabled.markdownDescription: Send Telegram notifications on TASK COMPLETE, ERROR, or DECISION NEEDED. The bot token and chat ID are stored only in VS Code SecretStorage — never in settings, never in the repo.

dev-trio.notifications.teams.enabled.markdownDescription: Send Microsoft Teams webhook notifications. The webhook URL is stored only in VS Code SecretStorage — never in settings.

dev-trio.notifications.slack.enabled.markdownDescription: Send Slack webhook notifications. The webhook URL is stored only in VS Code SecretStorage — never in settings.

dev-trio.notifications.discord.enabled.markdownDescription: Send Discord webhook notifications. The webhook URL is stored only in VS Code SecretStorage — never in settings.

dev-trio.notifications.customWebhook.ena.markdownDescription: Send custom webhook notifications. The webhook URL is stored only in VS Code SecretStorage — never in settings.

dev-trio.notifications.onTaskComplete.description: Notify when a task loop completes successfully.

dev-trio.notifications.onError.description: Notify when an unresolvable error is encountered.

dev-trio.notifications.onDecisionNeeded.description: Notify when the planner needs a human decision.

dev-trio.backupLog.enabled.description: Append plan/implement/audit cycle entries to the backup log.

dev-trio.backupLog.defaultPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to the chat backup log. Set automatically when you configure the backup log from the Dev-Trio sidebar. Leave empty to keep backup logging unconfigured — no backup file is created until you set it up.

dev-trio.toolsDir.markdownDescription: Absolute path for the user-profile tools directory (notify script location). Leave empty to use the default (`<home>/.dev-trio-tools`).

scripts.test:all: node _temp/tests/build-and-run.js && node _temp/tests/build-and-run-backuplog.js && node _temp/tests/build-and-run-notify.js && node _temp/tests/build-and-run-parsers.js && node _temp/tests/build-and-run-identity.js && node _temp/tests/build-and-run-probe.js && node _temp/tests/build-and-run-providers.js
